blended.narrative: Silver Star is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,299 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.8" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
